label: exam
narrative: Five past-exam questions plus one investment-data table. All jp stems/choices faithful to OCR; markers correct (jp ア/イ/ウ/エ, zh/en A/B/C/D). Answer indices correct (5-16 ア→0, 5-17 イ→1, 5-18 ウ→2, 5-19 イ→1, 5-20 ア→0). Table rows preserve all numeric values (250/80, 450/140, 700/200) and caption '単位　百万円' rendered as '单位　百万日元' / 'Unit: million yen'.
